title: Multiple-choice cloze
description: Read the text below and decide which answer (A, B, C or D) best fits each gap.

content.text: Advances in renewable energy have transformed how nations approach sustainability. Early projections (0) predicted slow adoption, but technological breakthroughs have accelerated progress dramatically.||Solar power, for example, has become increasingly affordable, allowing households to (1) their reliance on fossil fuels. Wind farms, too, have (2) significant gains in efficiency.||Despite these improvements, critics argue that renewable sources cannot yet (3) the energy demands of large cities. Storage limitations often (4) the stability of supply.||To overcome these challenges, engineers are working to (5) new battery technologies. Governments are also beginning to (6) incentives that encourage investment in clean energy.||Still, experts caution that nations must (7) long-term planning over short-term profits if they hope to (8) a sustainable future.

example.explanation: “Predicted” is the correct verb for early projections.

questions.explanation: “Secure a sustainable future” is the correct collocation.
